name.en-US: ERS-Display Elsys LoRaWAN Display Room Sensor
name.pt-BR: ERS-Display Sensor de Ambiente com Display LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys ERS-Display — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors temperature, humidity, light and motion. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys ERS-Display — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora temperatura, umidade, luz e movimento. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
